messages.content:
Translate to French
"The storehouses of heaven"
"Les entrepôts du ciel"

Translate to French
"Imagine a planet in which every continent is an Australia."
"Imaginez une planète sur laquelle chaque continent est une Australie."

Translate to Spanish
"Happy Thursday"
"¡Feliz jueves!"
What are the names of the days of the week in Spanish?

The days of the week in Spanish are:

1. Lunes (Monday)
2. Martes (Tuesday)
3. Miércoles (Wednesday)
4. Jueves (Thursday)
5. Viernes (Friday)
6. Sábado (Saturday)
7. Domingo (Sunday)
What are the names of the days of the week in French?

The days of the week in French are:

1. Lundi (Monday)
2. Mardi (Tuesday)
3. Mercredi (Wednesday)
4. Jeudi (Thursday)
5. Vendredi (Friday)
6. Samedi (Saturday)
7. Dimanche (Sunday)
What are the names of the days of the week in Polish?

The days of the week in Polish are:

1. Poniedziałek (Monday)
2. Wtorek (Tuesday)
3. Środa (Wednesday)
4. Czwartek (Thursday)
5. Piątek (Friday)
6. Sobota (Saturday)
7. Niedziela (Sunday)
What are the names of the days of the week in Turkish?

The days of the week in Turkish are:

1. Pazartesi (Monday)
2. Salı (Tuesday)
3. Çarşamba (Wednesday)
4. Perşembe (Thursday)
5. Cuma (Friday)
6. Cumartesi (Saturday)
7. Pazar (Sunday)
What are the names of the days of the week in Albanian?

The days of the week in Albanian are:

1. E hënë (Monday)
2. E martë (Tuesday)
3. E mërkurë (Wednesday)
4. E enjte (Thursday)
5. E premte (Friday)
6. E shtunë (Saturday)
7. E diel (Sunday)
What are the names of the days of the week in Russian?

The days of the week in Russian are:

1. Понедельник (Ponedelnik) - Monday
2. Вторник (Vtornik) - Tuesday
3. Среда (Sreda) - Wednesday
4. Четверг (Chetverg) - Thursday
5. Пятница (Pyatnitsa) - Friday
6. Суббота (Subbota) - Saturday
7. Воскресенье (Voskresenye) - Sunday
Write a customary greeting in Albanian.
A customary greeting in Albanian is "Mirëdita" for "Good day."

Translate to Albanian.

"Have a blessed day."
"Keni një ditë të bekuar."
